open_findings.title: Concurrent cost-log appends can interleave and corrupt costs.json lines
sprint_goal missing required fields return 500 instead of 4xx
Git auth token exposed via process args visible to local ps
DockerSandboxRunner mounts worktree as root with no read-only flag
Inconsistent module import extensions across the codebase (partial fix applied)
TaskStore insert never persists the attempts column it relies on
runner.ts logCosts uses task.id as sprintId fallback, corrupting sprint-level cost aggregation
defaultHaikuCall passes full prompt (including user brief) as argv — visible in ps aux
control-plane.ts parseCommand places no length cap on reason, userId, userLabel, or idempotencyKey
issue-commenter.ts lastCommentId mutable closure races if comment() called before waitForApproval resolves
queue/github.ts findLabelAddedAt paginates all issue events with no page count cap
DockerSandboxRunner falls back to in-worktree execution without requiring IFLEET_ALLOW_SANDBOX_FALLBACK
runner.ts logCosts only called on pr_opened path — failed/cancelled runs never record costs
audit-store.ts TERMINAL_SQL_LIST string interpolation is structurally fragile
queue/store.ts recoverStale reads IFLEET_MAX_ATTEMPTS env on every call rather than once at construction
workers/claude.ts passes full brief as -p argv — visible in ps aux for all pipeline phases
pipeline/reviewer.ts is a deprecated re-export shim with no enforced removal deadline
spawn-runner.ts cancel() does not short-circuit the SIGTERM grace period if process already exited
auto-router in-memory cache never expires — stale routing decisions persist across sprint submissions
contracts/hmac.ts verifyPayload has redundant length check after timingSafeEqual
server.ts deferringDiscordOut.postTaskCreated always returns empty threadId string without warning
audit-store.ts dbReadIndex returns null for both DB unreachable and zero-row cases without distinguishing them
budget.ts enforceBudget declared async but contains no await — misleading signature
